narrative:
Port Clinton 4A (precinct in Ottawa County) has 864 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.0 percentage points.
